title: Puma India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Puma India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Puma India! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Puma India:
Puma India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puma India!
